name: codex-desk
author: tai
description: Desktop app to organize multiple ChatGPT Plus/Codex accounts across macOS and Windows.

scripts.dist: npm run build && electron-builder --publish never --mac dmg zip --universal && electron-builder --publish never --win nsis portable --x64
scripts.dist:mac: npm run build && electron-builder --publish never --mac dmg zip --universal
scripts.dist:mac:split: npm run build && electron-builder --publish never --mac dmg zip --x64 --arm64
scripts.dist:win: npm run build && electron-builder --publish never --win nsis portable --x64
scripts.dist:win:arm64: npm run build && electron-builder --publish never --win nsis portable --arm64
scripts.release:mac: npm run build && node scripts/publish-release.mjs --mac dmg zip --universal
scripts.release:mac:split: npm run build && node scripts/publish-release.mjs --mac dmg zip --x64 --arm64
scripts.release:win: npm run build && node scripts/publish-release.mjs --win nsis portable --x64
scripts.release:win:arm64: npm run build && node scripts/publish-release.mjs --win nsis portable --arm64
